citations.narrative:
The registrant did not have a written contingency plan in place. Registrants are required to have a written contingency
plan which addresses the care and handling of their animals in the event of an emergency or disaster. The plan must be
kept current, and contain the required information for the facility per this section.
*******Corrected at the time of inspection on April 1, 2026 by Registrant voluntarily surrendering registration
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the registrant.

narrative:
2.134(a) 
   
Contingency planning. 
The registrant did not have a written contingency plan in place. Registrants are required to have a written contingency 
plan which addresses the care and handling of their animals in the event of an emergency or disaster. The plan must be 
kept current, and contain the required information for the facility per this section.  
*******Corrected at the time of inspection on April 1, 2026 by Registrant voluntarily surrendering registration 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the registrant. 
 
 n
